Bryan J. McCormack, Esq. (415) 440-6662 for Respondent and Moving Party Morales
Mark I. Schickman, Esq. (Court Call), Perkins, Cole LLC (415) 344-7024 for Petitioner and Opposing Party O'Keefe's, Inc.
RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling: RESPONDENT HUGO MORALES' Motion To Dismiss Appeal And Request For Sanctions: 1) DENIED. Labor Code 98.2(d) does not include failure to post timely bond; $750 under CCP 128 and does not preclude CCP) 995.710 undertaking. 2) Request For Sanctions is DENIED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/AS/MWF-X) Reporter: Valerie Papale, CSR #6899
